By accessing and using the Sovana website, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before placing an order.

Use of the Site: You may use this website for lawful purposes only. You agree not to reproduce, duplicate, or exploit any part of the site without our express written permission.

Products & Pricing: We reserve the right to modify prices, discontinue products, or limit quantities at any time. All prices are listed in USD and are subject to applicable taxes.

Accuracy of Information: We make every effort to display product colors and details accurately. However, we cannot guarantee that your screen accurately reflects the true color of our products.

Limitation of Liability: Sovana shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or website.

For any questions regarding these terms, contact us at hello@sovana.com.
